purpose: Canonical design token and layout specification for the SharePlan Ppompu community ad template. Ensures visual consistency across product sections when agents add, modify, or review listings.
design_intent: All product sections must look visually identical in weight, density and rhythm. The YouTube Premium section is the canonical reference. Agents must normalize any divergence to these tokens before shipping.
change_impact: Any change to tokens here should be propagated to all <div> cards in redesign-v4v1.html via inline styles (no external CSS — Ppompu strips external stylesheets).

constraints.reason: Ppompu forum strips <style> blocks and external CSS. All styles must be inline.

typography.font_family: 'Noto Sans KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif

single_plan_section.description: Used when only one offer term is available. Always paired with an official price comparison card.

multi_plan_section.description: Used when multiple term lengths exist for the same product type (e.g. 6-month + 12-month).

labeled_subsection.description: Used when a single product has distinct plan TYPES (e.g. YouTube 가족 플랜 vs 개인 단독). Each type gets its own pill-labeled sub-row.
labeled_subsection.pill_style: display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 12px; border-radius: 999px; color: #ffffff;

official_price_comparison_card.description: Left card showing the official retail price (crossed out) to contextualize the discount. Always placed LEFT of the SharePlan offer card.
official_price_comparison_card.discount_pill: display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 999px; color: #fff; background-color: <brand-color>

pricing_formula.description: Standard formula for converting USD supplier cost to KRW offering price.
pricing_formula.rounding: Round to nearest 100원 (or 1,000원 for prices above 50,000원)
pricing_formula.official_retail_reference: official_price_krw = original_price_usd × 1500 (no markup — used only for comparison card)

heading_row.style: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; border-bottom: 2px solid <brand-color-light>; padding-bottom: 8px;

note_block.style: margin-top: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 12px; color: #334155; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; line-height: 1.65; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
note_block.reason: Legacy <font> tags must be replaced with inline div styles. They break consistency and are not maintainable.

anti_patterns.name: absolute_positioned_badges
anti_patterns.description: Do NOT use position:absolute for labels or badges inside product cards.
anti_patterns.reason: Causes overflow/clipping on mobile screens in the Ppompu forum layout.

anti_patterns.name: font_tag_markup
anti_patterns.description: Do NOT use <font color=...> or <font face=...> tags.
anti_patterns.reason: Non-standard, not maintainable, inconsistent with the rest of the template.

anti_patterns.name: divergent_card_sizes
anti_patterns.description: Do NOT use padding: 24px on product cards.
anti_patterns.reason: Makes cards visually heavier than the YouTube reference. Always use padding: 16px.

anti_patterns.name: price_without_won_suffix
anti_patterns.description: Do NOT display bare numbers (e.g. 12,000). Always append 원 (e.g. 12,000원).
anti_patterns.reason: Incomplete price display looks like a rendering bug.

anti_patterns.name: single_card_without_comparison
anti_patterns.description: Do NOT add a single offer card for a product with a meaningful retail price without adding the official price comparison card on the left.
anti_patterns.reason: Without context, prices appear expensive. The comparison card communicates value.

nav_bar.description: The sticky section-jump nav at the top of the ad. Must be updated when sections are added or removed.
nav_bar.style: background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 12px; color: #0284c7; display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
